signals.headline: ETH ETFs Record Best Weekly Inflows Since January ($275M+), Driving Price to $2,403 Amid Institutional Return | YES | HI
signals.raw:
ETH ETFs Record Best Weekly Inflows Since January ($275M+), Driving Price to $2,403 Amid Institutional Return | YES | HIGH**  
Ethereum's price reached $2,403.78 at 9:15 a.m. ET today (April 22, 2026), up $98.74 from yesterday and 7% recently, as ETH ETFs saw their strongest weekly inflows since January—over $275 million—led by Fidelity and BlackRock, signaling renewed institutional demand.[1][2]
